name: Celery Sticks & Stones Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Celery, cut into 1 1/2 inch x 1/4 inch sticks, lightly cooked
2 cups Carrots, cut into 1 1/2 inch x 1/4 inch sticks, lightly cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, and sugar.
2. In a large bowl, combine celery, carrots, and water chestnuts.
3. Add the oil mixture to the vegetables and toss to coat evenly.
4. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate overnight before serving.
Makes 4 portions, approximately 3 1/2 cups.
